title: Wire up replay table in lichen_l2_input()
description:
The RX path in lichen_l2.c passes replay=NULL to lichen_link_rx(), which disables replay protection entirely. The replay table infrastructure already exists in replay.h (struct lichen_replay_table, lichen_replay_get(), etc.).

Required work:
1. Allocate static lichen_replay_table in lichen_l2.c
2. Initialize it in lichen_l2_iface_init()
3. Pass pointer to lichen_link_rx() instead of NULL
4. Consider cleanup in lichen_l2_enable(false) path

Note: Per replay.h warning comment, replay windows should only be allocated for authenticated peers to prevent replay window poisoning attacks. This depends on project-LICHEN-j70n (peer table implementation).

See SECURITY comment in lichen_l2.c around line 798.
